query:
-- Update Dr. Jose Ramon G. Albert with correct email and role
UPDATE media_outreach_status 
SET email = 'jrgalbert@gmail.com', role = 'Senior Research Fellow, Poverty & Statistics', priority = 'critical', mediaStatus = 'sent', lastContacted = '2026-04-09 00:00:00'
WHERE contactName = 'Dr. Jose Ramon G. Albert';

-- Update PCIJ with correct email
UPDATE media_outreach_status 
SET email = 'pcij@pcij.org', priority = 'critical', mediaStatus = 'sent', lastContacted = '2026-04-09 00:00:00'
WHERE contactName = 'Philippine Center for Investigative Journalism' OR organization = 'PCIJ';

-- Update Rappler
UPDATE media_outreach_status 
SET priority = 'critical', mediaStatus = 'sent', lastContacted = '2026-04-09 00:00:00'
WHERE organization = 'Rappler';

-- Update VERA Files
UPDATE media_outreach_status 
SET priority = 'high', mediaStatus = 'sent', lastContacted = '2026-04-09 00:00:00'
WHERE organization = 'VERA Files';

-- Update CMFR
UPDATE media_outreach_status 
SET priority = 'high', mediaStatus = 'sent', lastContacted = '2026-04-09 00:00:00'
WHERE organization = 'CMFR' OR organization LIKE '%Center for Media Freedom%';

-- Update NUJP
UPDATE media_outreach_status 
SET priority = 'high', mediaStatus = 'sent', lastContacted = '2026-04-09 00:00:00'
WHERE organization = 'NUJP' OR organization LIKE '%National Union%';

-- Update CPJ
UPDATE media_outreach_status 
SET priority = 'high', mediaStatus = 'sent', lastContacted = '2026-04-09 00:00:00'
WHERE organization = 'CPJ' OR organization LIKE '%Committee to Protect%';

-- Update RSF
UPDATE media_outreach_status 
SET priority = 'high', mediaStatus = 'sent', lastContacted = '2026-04-09 00:00:00'
WHERE organization = 'RSF' OR organization LIKE '%Reporters Without%' OR organization LIKE '%Reporters Sans%';

-- Update DSWD
UPDATE media_outreach_status 
SET priority = 'critical', mediaStatus = 'sent', lastContacted = '2026-04-09 00:00:00'
WHERE organization = 'DSWD' OR organization LIKE '%Department of Social%';

-- Update Inquirer
UPDATE media_outreach_status 
SET priority = 'high', mediaStatus = 'sent', lastContacted = '2026-04-09 00:00:00'
WHERE organization LIKE '%Inquirer%';
